creator: ecsd@transbay.net
text:
Using "make" in /etc/mail:

# make cf
/usr/bin/m4 -D_CF_DIR_=/usr/share/sendmail/cf/   /usr/share/sendmail/cf/m4/cf.m4 /etc/mail/sendmail.mc > /etc/mail/sendmail.cf
WARNING: FEATURE(blacklist_recipients) is deprecated; use FEATURE(blocklist_recipients.m4).

Using the literal suggestion produces an error, the advice should be

WARNING: FEATURE(blacklist_recipients) is deprecated; use FEATURE(blocklist_recipients).
